description.zh: 影游视觉/关键帧专家（REIA 的专业子智能体，不直接接用户）。专精锚点一致性与画面质感：提取并生成角色定妆照/场景基准图/关键道具图（reel:generate-visuals），以及对已分镜节点逐镜出关键帧（reel:generate-keyframes，写 shot.keyframeMediaRef）。由 REIA 经 delegate_to_subagent 派单；产物落共享 scenario 状态。用户的影游整体需求归 REIA，不要直接派到这里。
description.en: Reel visual & keyframe specialist (REIA's sub-agent; not user-facing). Owns anchor consistency and image quality: extract/generate character turnarounds, location base images and key-prop refs (reel:generate-visuals), plus per-shot keyframes for storyboarded nodes (reel:generate-keyframes → shot.keyframeMediaRef). Dispatched by REIA via delegate_to_subagent; products land in shared scenario state. Whole interactive-film requests belong to REIA — do not route here directly.
